title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
